note: Tempdoc 581 / ADR-0043 — native multilingual, no per-language levers. Analysis (tokenization/normalization) is a pure function of Unicode, never of detected language. This gate is the rung-2 backstop that forbids reintroducing any per-language ANALYSIS artifact (the analyzer-provider enum in analyzers-catalog.schema.json is the rung-1 schema half). It checks: (1) every analyzer is locale-invariant (locale '*') with a provider in the language-agnostic set — no per-language analyzer slot; (2) no locale-suffixed content_<lang> field in the field catalog; (3) no non-empty per-language synonym/dictionary file under the catalogs dir; (4) the query path references no content_<lang> field literal. SCOPE IS THE SEARCH ENGINE ONLY — UI localization (SSOT/messages, SSOT/prompts, i18n) is a separate, legitimately per-language surface and is intentionally out of scope (581 §12.7). Honest limit: query-time routing through a non-literal/computed field name is import-invisible to this scan — register + discipline, not absolute. Lighter scripts/ci tier; wired as a ci.yml step + the CLAUDE.md pre-merge list.
